name: Impossible Chicken 'n Broccoli Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a pie plate measuring 10 x 1-1/2 inches.
3. Rinse broccoli in cold water to thaw, then drain thoroughly.
4. In the pie plate, mix together broccoli, 1 1/3 cups cheese, chicken, and onion.
5. In a blender, beat milk, eggs, Bisquick, salt, and pepper for 15 seconds on high speed, or whisk/hand beat for 1 minute until smooth.
6. Pour the mixture into the pie plate over the broccoli mixture.
7. Bake at 400°F for 30-35 minutes, or until a knife inserted comes out clean.
8. Top with remaining cheese and bake an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
9. Let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
FOR HALF RECIPE:
Use 1 quart square or round casserole dish.
Decrease eggs to 2 and Bisquick to 1/2 cup.
Divide remaining ingredient amounts in half.
Reduce blender mixing time to 10 seconds.
Reduce whisk/hand beater mixing time to 30 seconds.
HIGH ALTITUDE: Bake for 35-45 minutes.
